core_mechanism: codimension-2 bifurcation organizing center (a cusp-of-cycles / generalized-Hopf point) that, together with saddle-node bifurcations of periodic orbits, generates detached (disconnected) branches of limit cycles — isolas — and coexisting stable oscillatory states, yielding parameter-threshold-dependent onset and multistable selection among periodic attractors
brief_reason: The abstract centers on bifurcation-theory / numerical-continuation analysis in which a codimension-2 cusp-of-cycles point plus saddle-node bifurcations of limit cycles create isolated branches of periodic orbits and coexisting stable oscillations, giving threshold-dependent onset and multistability.
